name: Grand Atrium & Entrance
title: The majestic gateway featuring monumental statues like the 83-ton Colossus of Ramses II.

name: The Grand Staircase
title: A chronological journey through 60 masterpieces showcasing Royal Image and Divine Houses.

name: Tutankhamun Gallery
title: The complete collection of the boy king, showcasing the Golden Mask and over 5,000 treasures.

name: Solar Boat Pavilion
title: Home to King Khufu's solar boat, the oldest intact wooden vessel symbolizing the journey to eternity.

name: Main Exhibition Halls
title: Exploring Egypt's history from the Old Kingdom to the Greco-Roman period with curated artifacts.

name: Journey to Eternity
title: A specialized collection of royal stone and wooden coffins that protected pharaohs in the afterlife.
